text.title: Requirements Validation Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: run-checklist
step.action: Walk each requirement through the checklist.

step.name: collect-feasibility
step.action: Confirm each requirement is technically feasible.

step.name: compile-report
step.action: Assemble validation report; capture blocking issues.
